subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! From the realm of Hindustan, particularly from Bombay, glad tidings are reaching us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء از خطه هندوستان علی الخصوص بمبای خبر خوش میرسد و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love and unity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @bringing forth results; fruit
